description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers featuring a bold color scheme of blue and red with white accents. The upper part of the shoes is predominantly blue with intricate red graphic patterns, while the toe cap, heel, and lace area are highlighted in red. White diagonal stripes run along the sides, adding a sporty touch. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with metal eyelets and a padded collar for ankle support. The soles are thick, flat, and white, providing a strong contrast to the vibrant upper. The overall design suggests a modern, urban style suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: High-top sneakers with a blue and red color scheme, white accents, and graphic patterns, featuring a lace-up design and thick white soles.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the blue upper with red graphic patterns, white stripes, and red toe cap; laces and padded collar are visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white diagonal stripes, red heel, and the detailed graphic pattern on the blue upper.
description_view_2: Rear and bottom view showing the red heel, blue collar interior, and the white sole extending up the back.
description_view_3: Bottom and side view displaying the flat, white sole and the patterned blue and red upper from below.
